discovery_daily.session: Discovery Scout 19:00 IT (Memorial Day — mercati chiusi, analisi pre-opening 26/05)
discovery_daily.macro_note: NYSE chiuso Memorial Day 25/05. Regime TRANSIZIONE confermato. China broker crackdown (Futu, Tiger) capital rotation US small-cap biotech. PCE May 28 HIGH IMPACT. 10Y 4.57% easing. Russell 2000 +0.91%.
alerts: REPL ASCO oral May 30 + May 31: RP1 3yr OS + RP2 final Ph1. SI 43.93% squeeze risk. WATCHLIST UPGRADE.
SPRO PDUFA FDA June 18: tebipenem HBr cUTI primo oral carbapenem USA. NUOVO.
IBRX FDA sBLA acceptance May 19 ANKTIVA papillary + Saudi launch. Q1 +168% YoY. WATCHLIST UPGRADE.
PCE May 28 HIGH IMPACT: se benign small-cap rally, se hot risk-off.
YMM/VIPS China broker crackdown: caution/exit ADR cinesi.

candidates.catalyst: PDUFA June 18 2026 — tebipenem HBr cUTI (primo oral carbapenem USA). Phase 3 PIVOT-PO stopped early for efficacy. NDA GSK. Milestones >$300M + royalties.

pensiero_critico.regime: TRANSIZIONE — capital rotation biotech PDUFA. 10Y easing allenta pressione growth.
pensiero_critico.narrativa_numeri: Cash $56.1M runway to 2028. Q1 loss $7.2M. Revenue Q1 $258K. 2025 profitto $8.6M da GSK milestones. Non revenue-generating autonomamente.
pensiero_critico.rischio_asimmetrico: worst case FDA reject: -70% verso $0.75. Binary puro.
pensiero_critico.kindleberger: Stage 3 (da 52w low $0.656 a $2.50 = +281%, recovery da CRL crash Apr 10)
flags: Revenue minimale dipende tutto da FDA

candidates.warning: Binary June 18. Float 57M. No scaling pre-FDA. GSK credibilita ma CRL precedente.

candidates.catalyst: US-Japan Joint Fact Sheet: Neves Project unico litio brasiliano in lista per potential government support. Mitsui $30M + offtake. DFS IRR 145%, NPV $539M vs cap $125M.

pensiero_critico.rischio_asimmetrico: worst case: support non materializzato, litio debole: -35-40% verso $2.50

candidates.warning: US-Japan support non ancora firmato. Timeline sviluppo lunga. Sizing conservativo.
